title: Additional Ores
description: Create unbelievable instruments, armor and mine the best ores in Minecraft!
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a965711d49dec15966f5b056eac7543bef099bb.png)

## Features
- The most powerful instruments in the game
- The best armor in the game
- New unique recipes



[![discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/discord-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/2qn652Uytz) [![forge](https://img.shields.io/badge/forge-000000?style=for-the-badge&logoUrl=https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/MinecraftForge/branding@master/F_logo_small.gif&logoColor=white)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/additional-ores-armor-and-weapons)

## Description

This mod adds 5 new ores to the Minecraft such as Titan, Cobalt, Iridium, Cosmic Dust and Cosmic Fragment. Titan, Cobalt and Iridium generate in the Overworld. Cosmic Dust spawns in the Nether and Cosmic Fragment spawns in the End dimension.

Iridium Ore is slightly worse than Iron Ore, however it appears more often in the world.

Cobalt Ore is worse than Diamond Ore. But there is also more Cobalt Ore than Diamond Ore. 

Titan is between Netherite and Diamond. And so, it is harder to find than Diamonds.

Cosmic Dust spawns in the Nether. This Ore is used for crafting Cosmic Sticks. They are made from combining one Obsidian Stick and one Cosmic Dust.

Cosmic Armor and Cosmic Weapons can be created from Cosmic Fragments.
